title: NHKマイルCの後に・遠い光

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Digital charges through! At home on turf
and dirt, this wonder has shown us her strength
today!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Huff, puff... I did it... I spent all my strength... with none to spare even for my oshis...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: The sky is... so... far...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: But there's a light...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Ah, this light...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Thunk!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Digital?! Wake up, Digital!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Mmm... Uhh...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Opera O... and... Doto?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Oh, thank goodness you woke up. I didn't know
what to do.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Th-thanks... I'm still inexperienced, but I knew if I
didn't push myself to the limit, I wouldn't be able
to see the same scenery as my oshis.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
But forget about that. What are you two doing
here?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
We were watching you in secret since before the
race began, clad in the garb of stadium vendors.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I didn't want to bother you, so that's why I didn't
speak to you in the paddock.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Ah, that explains that feeling I had...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
That's incredible! I can't believe you two would go
to the trouble of coming to see me.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Um... I should say... I think I learned a little
something today!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I caught a glipse of why you, Opera O, forge such
a bold path—and why you, Doto, chase glory so
dazzlingly!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: I finally get it... at least a little...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Haaah ha ha! You don't say. Although, I would be
remiss if I failed to point out that my
magnificence was inherited at birth.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
But if you're intent on worshipping me so, why
don't I show you something even more
resplendent?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Of course, I'm speaking of our very first
competitive performance, a showdown between
Doto and myself.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Ooh... a showdown! Unbelievable!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. I'm finally running a G1. Of course, I'm just
one of many though.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
But I finally get to run with my hero Opera O at
the Takarazuka Kinen!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Hrngh!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Gasp! Digital!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
The heavens crumble! My oshis are going big?!
This is like a dome concert-level holy event!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I'll have to prepare a feast for the goddesses in
appreciation of how good I'm eating right now!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Haaah ha ha! By all means, come and watch. In
return...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
There is an arc to your story which you have not
yet revealed. Is this not so?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I hear talk of you being a so-called "all-rounder"
who performs with equally sure footing—no
matter the stage.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Today, you performed on turf. Thus, I expect you
have one more act up your sleeve.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
If I'm not mistaken, there is an ideal dirt race
around the same time as the Takarazuka Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A big dirt race held around the same time as the
Takarazuka Kinen...
choice_data_list: You're thinking of the Japan Dirt Derby.
You're thinking of the Japan Dirt Derby.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Well done. It seems you have the field already
scoped out.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Please give it some consideration, as
reciprocation for the Takarazuka Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Reciprocation... So, I'm in debt to Opera O and
Doto...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Trainer! I've got to be there!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
The starlit track... The heart-catching course that
illuminates the love in couples' hearts—a second
Tokyo!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
That's right. Let's run in the Japan Dirt Derby. I
want to show Opera O and Doto what I can do, of
course. But it's not only that...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I have to find out if that sparkle... that intensity I
saw today at the NHK Mile Cup...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I have to know if it's the same at G1 dirt races
too!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Thank you! This time, let us behold the powerful
Umas who cavort across the dirt!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I'm not picky about tracks or pairings! I'll take
whatever's put in front of me!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I don't really get that last part... But either way, it
looks like we have our sights set on the G1 Japan
Dirt Derby next!
